name: novel_topic_analyzer
description: Analyzes web novel market data to identify trending topics, track selection, and market opportunities. Invoke when user needs topic analysis, track selection, or market opportunity identification.
instructions: Analyze the provided market data to identify trending topics and patterns
Evaluate competition levels in different tracks
Identify blue ocean opportunities with low competition and high demand
Provide detailed analysis of reader preferences and market gaps
Generate ranked recommendations for optimal track selection

data_source.description: 市场数据源文件路径或JSON数据

top_tracks.description: 返回最佳赛道数量，默认5
